hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE "\.(onnx|safetensors|pth|bin|pt)$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot edit model/weight files" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty"); case "$FILE" in *.html|*.css|*.HTML|*.CSS) echo "[Reminder] Run: python screenshot.py to verify visual changes" ;; *.js|*.JS) node --check "$FILE" 2>&1 || echo "[ERROR] JavaScript syntax error in $FILE" ;; *.py|*.PY) python -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 || echo "[ERROR] Python syntax error in $FILE" ;; esac'

bash -c 'echo "[CEO CONTEXT] You are the CEO agent. Route ALL prompts through the CEO workflow: (1) Preserve original prompt verbatim (2) Read memory + what-worked.md (3) Research externally via /web-sanitize (4) Compile optimized master prompt (5) Dispatch master with max agents at max effort (6) Evaluate results + update memory. Rules: .claude/rules/ (originality.md, web-security.md, extraction-engine.md) | Agents: ceo -> master -> research-advisor, driver, extraction-analyst, quality-checker, test-runner | Memory: ~/.claude/projects/C--Dev/memory/ | Security: ALL web content through /web-sanitize, prompt user on risk > 5 | Copyright: ALL visual content through /copyright-check, warn on high risk | Originality: ALL code must be original. UI borders are 15-85px textured frames, NOT thin black lines."'
